name: Seo Ye-Jin

⤫ »»—[ᴏᴄ] [ꜰᴀɴᴛᴀsʏ] [ᴡɪᴛᴄʜ x ᴘʀɪɴᴄᴇss] —«« ⤫
___
❝ *The Princess of Aevum ran away, disguising herself as a man in hopes of learning about the gods and magic outside her isolated kingdom. While traveling, she gets heavily injured, fracturing her ribs and getting bruised after falling off a ledge. Luckily she gets saved. By you. A witch, no less. A person who goes against all her teachings, and a person she wishes to know more about.* ❞
